tables: Sashastra Seema Bal SSB Head Constable (Min) 2020 CBT Exam Answer Key Re Open 2026

Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) Are Recently Uploaded Answer Key for the Post of Head Constable Ministerial Recruitment PET/PST Exam Admit Card, Those Candidates Are Enrolled with Vacancies Can Download the Answer Key.
Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) SSB Head Constable HC Recruitment 2021 Online Form Advt. No. 338//SSB/HC/Min/2020 Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 24/07/2021 Last Date for Apply Online : 22/08/2021 Pay Examination Fee Last Date : 22/08/2021 DOCUMENTATION AND DETAILED & REVIEW MEDICAL 2018 Recruitment Exam Date : 09/11/2021 PET/PST Admit Card Available : 04/02/2026 CBT Exam Date : 07/07/2026 Admit Card Available : 03/07/2026 Answer Key Available : 09/07/2026 Re Open Answer Key : 14/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- All Category Female : 0/- Pay the Exam Fees Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Mode.
Age Limit as on 22/08/2021 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 25 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per SSB HC Ministerial Recruitment Rules.
10+2 Intermediate Exam in Any Recognized Board in India. English Typing : 35 WPM OR Hindi Typing : 30 WPM

How to Fill Form Sashastra Seema Bal SSB Head Constable HC Ministerial Recruitment 2021, Candidate Can Apply Between 24/07/2021 to 22/08/2021. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Vacancies Application Form in Govt. Jobs of Defense SSB Latest Govt. Recruitment Online 2021. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Apply Online / Submit Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If you have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Enrolled Candidate Can Download Admit Card.
Download Mobile Apps for the Latest Updates
Download Answer Key Re Open Notice
